---
title: "Rodrigo Aguayo"
---

<!--
  The home page uses customer header/footer includes from _quarto.yml.
-->

<div class="page">

Hey, I'm **Rodrigo**! 👋 I'm a postdoctoral researcher at the [Vrije Universiteit Brussel](https://hydr.vub.be/people/rodrigo.aguayo), where I work with the [bglacier](https://hydr.vub.be/research-groups/bglacier) glaciology group. I spend my days thinking about how climate change is reshaping mountain glaciers — and what that means for the water we rely on downstream.

I live at the intersection of **large-scale hydrology, glaciology, climate science, and deep learning**. Basically, I build models to understand how ice and water interact in a warming world, with a soft spot for the wild landscapes of Patagonia.

{{< include _includes/social-links.md >}}

---

## Research Themes

<div class="themes-grid">
<div class="card">
  <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" style="vertical-align:-3px;margin-right:6px;fill:var(--accent)"><path d="M14 6l-3.75 5 2.85 3.8-1.6 1.2C9.81 13.75 7 10 7 10l-6 8h22L14 6z"/></svg> Glaciology & Glacier Hydrology</h3>
  <p>Global and regional glacier evolution, glacier runoff projections, ice dynamics, glacier lake-terminating systems, multi-century glacier evolution.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" style="vertical-align:-3px;margin-right:6px;fill:var(--accent)"><path d="M12 2C10.34 8.34 6 12.43 6 16.43c0 3.31 2.69 6 6 6s6-2.69 6-6c0-4-4.34-8.08-6-14.43z"/></svg> Large-Scale Hydrology & Climate Impacts</h3>
  <p>Climate change impacts on water resources, hydrological droughts, freshwater inputs to coastal systems, hybrid glacio-hydrological modelling.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" style="vertical-align:-3px;margin-right:6px;fill:var(--accent)"><path d="M12 2l2.4 7.6L22 12l-7.6 2.4L12 22l-2.4-7.6L2 12l7.6-2.4z"/></svg> Deep Learning for Earth Systems</h3>
  <p>Deep learning applications for glacier buffering of streamflow droughts, AI/ML for hydrological prediction, open-source reproducible workflows.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" style="vertical-align:-3px;margin-right:6px;fill:var(--accent)"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm-1 17.93c-3.95-.49-7-3.85-7-7.93 0-.62.08-1.21.21-1.79L9 15v1c0 1.1.9 2 2 2v1.93zm6.9-2.54c-.26-.81-1-1.39-1.9-1.39h-1v-3c0-.55-.45-1-1-1H8v-2h2c.55 0 1-.45 1-1V7h2c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2v-.41c2.93 1.19 5 4.06 5 7.41 0 2.08-.8 3.97-2.1 5.39z"/></svg> Open Science & Data</h3>
  <p>Open hydrometeorological datasets (PatagoniaMet), reproducible research, open-source tools for glacier modelling.</p>
</div>
</div>

---

## Featured Publications

{{< include _includes/featured.md >}}

[View all publications →](publications.qmd)


</div>
